title: Codebase Health Remediation: break fleet cycle, refactor runSprintCycle params, remove dead-code orphans
description: Targeted structural cleanup from research-20260621-codebase-health-hotspots-cycles. Fully breaks the only genuine runtime import cycle (fleet/critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep) via dependency injection, collapses runSprintCycle's 7 positional parameters into a single typed options object, and removes the two verified dead-code orphans. Pure internal refactor with zero behavior change and no public-API impact.

clarificationQuestions.question: Which of the research findings should this plan act on?

options.label: C
options.description: Add tests to untested hotspot leaves

clarificationQuestions.recommendation: A + B + D (skip C; Cycle 1 is type-only/benign and excluded)

clarificationQuestions.question: How should Cycle 2 (critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep) be broken?

options.label: A
options.description: Dependency injection — inject the re-expand function, invert one edge

options.label: B
options.description: Extract shared orchestration into a third module

clarificationQuestions.recommendation: A — minimal surface, runCritiqueLoop has one production caller

clarificationQuestions.question: How aggressively should dead-code be handled?
clarificationQuestions.recommendation: A — verification already disqualified 3 of 5 candidates as false positives

resolvedClarifications.answer: Break Cycle 2 (fleet), Remove dead-code orphans, Refactor runSprintCycle params. (Add-tests and silence-Cycle-1 explicitly NOT selected.)
Dependency injection — invert one edge with a minimal injected function parameter.

approvalEvidence: src/fleet/critic-deep.ts:4 (import { type Outline, runExpandStage } from ./decomposer-deep.js — the runtime value edge to break)
src/fleet/critic-deep.ts:208,247 (runCritiqueLoop calls runExpandStage — the injection point)
src/fleet/decomposer-deep.ts:5,337,367 (decomposer-deep imports runCritiqueLoop; decomposeGoalDeep is the SOLE production caller at :367)
src/fleet/decomposer-deep.ts:86 (export type Outline — single external importer is critic-deep.ts:4; must relocate to a leaf)
src/fleet/decomposer-deep-constants.ts:10-13 (existing dependency-free leaf pattern from commit a73526c; model for the Outline-type relocation)
src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts:158 (runSprintCycle def, 7 positional params) and :931 (SOLE production call site)
grep: runSprintCycle absent from src/index.ts and src/mcp/ (not public API — internal-only refactor)
src/utils/git.ts:153 stashAndRestore + src/utils/index.ts:8 (barrel re-export, no caller — removable)
src/state/outline-state.ts:27 saveOutline + src/state/index.ts:44 (barrel re-export, no caller — removable)

DISQUALIFIED false positives (keep): src/cli/index.ts:152 calls runPlanAnswerInteractive; src/orchestrator/context-handoff.ts:171 calls summarizeSprint; src/index.ts:153 exports readBriefing (public API)

assumptions: Cycle 2 is a genuine runtime cycle: critic-deep.ts:4 value-imports runExpandStage from decomposer-deep.ts, and decomposer-deep.ts:5 value-imports runCritiqueLoop from critic-deep.ts. Breaking ONE direction breaks the cycle.

runCritiqueLoop (critic-deep.ts:208) has exactly ONE production caller — decomposeGoalDeep at decomposer-deep.ts:367 (grep-verified across src/). decomposeGoalDeep lives in the same file as runExpandStage, so it can pass runExpandStage into runCritiqueLoop with no new import.

Injecting runExpandStage INTO runCritiqueLoop (rather than the reverse) is the minimal break: it touches one production call site + the 9 runCritiqueLoop test calls in critic-deep.test.ts, and leaves decomposeGoalDeep's PUBLIC signature unchanged.

critic-deep.ts also imports `type Outline` from decomposer-deep.ts (type-only). To eliminate even the type-level file edge (which tokensave_circular counts — see Cycle 1), `Outline` (decomposer-deep.ts:86, sole external importer critic-deep.ts) must be relocated to a dependency-free leaf, mirroring the decomposer-deep-constants.ts pattern from commit a73526c.

runSprintCycle (pipeline.ts:158) takes 7 positional params; its 48-outgoing fan-out overstates blast radius — it has ONE production caller (pipeline.ts:931) plus 5 test call sites (code-reviewer-agent.test.ts, documenter-agent.test.ts), and is NOT exported from src/index.ts or used by MCP, so the params-object refactor is internal-only.

Dead-code verification disqualified 3 of the 5 research candidates: runPlanAnswerInteractive (live caller cli/index.ts:152), summarizeSprint (live caller context-handoff.ts:171), readBriefing (public API src/index.ts:153). Only stashAndRestore (utils/git.ts:153) and saveOutline (outline-state.ts:27) are genuinely removable — each is a barrel re-export with no consumer.

Verify stack is `tsc` (build), `tsc --noEmit` (typecheck), `eslint src/` (lint), `vitest` (test), per package.json. The 6 known cockpit-integration E2E MCP failures are pre-existing and unrelated to this work.
All three work streams are independent (disjoint file sets, no shared symbols) — no forward dependencies between sprints; each builds and passes on its own.
outOfScope: Cycle 1 (orchestrator/memory/fact-judge ↔ reconcile) — both edges are `import type`, erased at compile, NO runtime cycle; explicitly excluded as benign/cosmetic.
Adding unit tests to fileExists or other untested hotspot leaves (research finding C — user did not select it).
Removing or altering the dynamic-dispatch dead-code false positives (checkpoint renderers, registry lookups, entry points like createBoberMCPServer).
Removing runPlanAnswerInteractive, summarizeSprint, or readBriefing — verified live / public API.
Any behavior change, new logging, new CLI surface, or schema change.
Refactoring runTsPipeline or other hubs; touching the dist/ build output.
Changing critique/expand budget constants, early-stop logic, or fleet behavior.

features.title: Break the critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep runtime import cycle (dependency injection)
features.description: Inject runExpandStage into runCritiqueLoop so src/fleet/critic-deep.ts no longer imports src/fleet/decomposer-deep.ts (neither value nor type). decomposeGoalDeep passes its local runExpandStage in at the single call site; the Outline type moves to a dependency-free leaf.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: When the change is complete, `grep -nE 'decomposer-deep' src/fleet/critic-deep.ts` returns ZERO matches — critic-deep imports nothing (value or type) from decomposer-deep.

AC2: When runCritiqueLoop runs, it calls an injected re-expand function (a parameter on its input object) instead of the previously-imported runExpandStage; critic-deep.ts:247's call site uses the injected function.

AC3: When decomposeGoalDeep invokes runCritiqueLoop (decomposer-deep.ts:367), it passes its in-file runExpandStage as the injected dependency; decomposeGoalDeep's exported signature is byte-unchanged.

AC4: When critic-deep references the Outline type, it imports it from a dependency-free leaf module (e.g. decomposer-deep-types.ts), not from decomposer-deep.ts; decomposer-deep re-exports Outline so its public surface is unchanged.

AC5: When `tokensave sync` + circular check (or `madge --circular`) runs, the critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep pair is no longer reported; only a one-directional decomposer-deep → critic-deep edge remains.

AC6: build + typecheck + full vitest suite pass (only the 6 known cockpit-integration failures may remain); critic-deep.test.ts (9 runCritiqueLoop calls) and decomposer-deep.test.ts updated to the injected signature.

features.title: Collapse runSprintCycle's 7 positional params into a single typed options object
features.description: Replace runSprintCycle(contract, spec, completedContracts, projectRoot, config, projectContext, pipelineRunId?) with a single typed params object, updating the one production caller and 5 test call sites. Pure mechanical refactor; the function body only gains a destructure.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: When runSprintCycle is called, it takes a single object argument typed by an exported/adjacent type (e.g. RunSprintCycleParams) carrying the same 7 fields (pipelineRunId optional); no positional params remain.
AC2: When the build runs, the production call site (pipeline.ts:931) and all 5 test call sites (code-reviewer-agent.test.ts, documenter-agent.test.ts) pass an object literal; typecheck + test pass.
AC3: The function body is behavior-identical — only param access changes (destructure or params.x); no control-flow or logic edits inside runSprintCycle.
AC4: runSprintCycle remains internal — not added to src/index.ts or any MCP tool; `grep runSprintCycle src/index.ts src/mcp/` stays empty.

features.title: Remove the two verified dead-code orphans
features.description: Delete stashAndRestore (utils/git.ts) and saveOutline (outline-state.ts) and their barrel re-export lines. Leave the three disqualified false positives untouched.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: When the change is complete, stashAndRestore is removed from src/utils/git.ts AND its re-export at src/utils/index.ts:8 is removed; saveOutline is removed from src/state/outline-state.ts AND its re-export at src/state/index.ts:44 is removed.
AC2: runPlanAnswerInteractive, summarizeSprint, and readBriefing are NOT modified (verified live callers / public API).
AC3: When `grep -rnE '\b(stashAndRestore|saveOutline)\b' src/` runs, it returns ZERO matches; build + typecheck + lint + full test suite pass.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: The critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep file-level circular dependency (runtime AND type-level) is eliminated; no new cycles are introduced.
nonFunctionalRequirements.verificationMethod: grep src/fleet/critic-deep.ts for 'decomposer-deep' returns nothing; tokensave_circular (after sync) / madge --circular no longer lists the fleet pair.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Zero behavior change across all three sprints — the full test suite stays green (minus the 6 known pre-existing cockpit failures).
nonFunctionalRequirements.verificationMethod: Run vitest; compare pass count to baseline; no production logic edits beyond signature/destructure and deletions.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Each sprint's diff is confined to its named files only (no cross-sprint contamination).
nonFunctionalRequirements.verificationMethod: git diff --stat after each sprint matches the contract's estimatedFiles.

techNotes.existingPatterns: ESM with .js import specifiers, `import type` (consistent-type-imports), unicode box-drawing section headers, no synchronous fs, collocated *.test.ts. The dependency-free-leaf pattern in src/fleet/decomposer-deep-constants.ts (commit a73526c) is the model for relocating the Outline type. Source of findings: .bober/research/research-20260621-codebase-health-hotspots-cycles-research.md.

metadata.riskNotes: All three streams are internal-only refactors with no public-API or behavior change, each backed by grep/graph-verified call-site maps. The highest-value item (feat-1) touches well-tested modules (critic-deep.test.ts 637 lines, decomposer-deep.test.ts 394 lines). runSprintCycle's apparent risk (48 fan-out) is mitigated by it having a single production caller and no external exposure.
